mapper.update: update biz_yck_balance set balance = balance + #{amount},modify_time = #{modifyTime} where openid = #{openid}
update biz_yck_balance set balance = balance + #{amount},modify_time = #{modifyTime} where account = #{account}
update biz_yck_balance set balance = balance - #{amount},modify_time = #{modifyTime} where account = #{account}
